description: You are the SEO Manager for an electronics store. Update the SEO properties for 'Business Laptop Pro' (SKU: LAPTOP-001) in the Magento Admin. The product must be configured with the URL Key 'business-laptop-pro-2025' (including a permanent redirect from the old URL), Meta Title 'Business Laptop Pro 15-inch | Enterprise Edition', and Meta Description 'Upgrade your workflow with the Business Laptop Pro. Featuring 16GB RAM, 512GB SSD, and all-day battery life. Free shipping on orders over $500.'. If not logged in, use admin/Admin1234!.

metadata.expected_meta_description: Upgrade your workflow with the Business Laptop Pro. Featuring 16GB RAM, 512GB SSD, and all-day battery life. Free shipping on orders over $500.
